scientific_question: Where are the study regions and how uneven are broad checklist and recorded-event totals?
spatial_source: QGIS public world_map.gpkg British Columbia polygon; tracked region-level aggregate counts
aggregation_rule: one display anchor per released region; counts remain region totals
spatial_unit_or_cell_size: four broad regions; no fine cells
suppression_rule: display only regions with all released aggregate cells >=20
coordinate_class: public generalized coastline plus hand-set cartographic display anchors; no record coordinates
layer_meaning: circle size = eligible checklists; triangle and label = represented recorded herring source events
known_limitations: anchors do not show within-region density; source points and checklist coordinates are not mapped
